projects.title: Settlers of Catan
projects.description: Clone of the board game 'The Settlers of Catan' using Python and Pygame. Group-based project in Agile environment.

projects.title: Antique Web App
projects.description: Simple web app for listing antiques and requesting evaluations. Implements cyber-security features such as 2FA, XSS and CSRF protection, ReCaptcha, password recovery services, and more.

projects.title: Automaton Simulator
projects.description: Web app that allows users to construct automaton models and see a step-by-step visual simulation showing how it reads an input and either accepts it or rejects it.

projects.title: Coca Cola 3D App
projects.description: 3D single-page web-application for viewing 3D models of Coca Cola drinks through different camera angles, animations, lighting systems, and rendering modes. MVC architecture using PHP, SQLite database and various external APIs.
